children.heading: Program activities and periods; consultations with heads of Federal agencies and non-Federal organizations
children.label: a Program activities and periods; consultations with heads of Federal agencies and non-Federal organizations

children.text: a five-year program for small wind energy systems,
an eight-year program for large wind energy systems, and
a three-year program for wind resource assessment1So in original. Probably should be followed by a comma.1

children.heading: Initial transmittal to Congressional committees
children.label: b Initial transmittal to Congressional committees
children.text: The Secretary shall transmit the comprehensive program management plan to the Committee on Science and Technology of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the Senate within nine months after .September 8, 1980

children.heading: Subsequent transmittals to Congress; descriptive statement: current plan, changes, justification for changes, progress, interagency cooperation, and recommendations for achievement of goals
children.label: c Subsequent transmittals to Congress; descriptive statement: current plan, changes, justification for changes, progress, interagency cooperation, and recommendations for achievement of goals

children.text: the anticipated research, development, demonstration, and technology application objectives to be achieved by the program;
the program elements, management structure, and activities, including any regional aspects and field responsibilities thereof;
the program strategies and technology applications plans, including detailed mile- stone goals to be achieved during the next fiscal year for all major activities and projects;
any significant economic, environmental, and societal effects which the program may have;
the total estimated cost of individual program items; and
the estimated relative financial contributions of the Federal Government and non-Federal participants in the program.
